findings.finding: PR readiness mutation and confirmation remain mediated by the GameApi.Client adapter; Symphony holds no GitHub credential and makes no direct GitHub provider call.

The readiness identity is bound to repository, issue, run, PR number, and exact HEAD with a deterministic operation ID; authoritative idempotent replay supports restart and response-loss recovery without a second provider mutation.
A durable completed readiness receipt and a fresh normalized PR read proving open, non-draft, exact-HEAD state are both required before the merge-capable deployment-verifier role starts.

Exact-commit evidence for c3554e69d100bbf2a0fe5ec4badfbd8459138dc4 reports the targeted adversarial/recovery tests and the full make all gate passed (278 tests, 2 skipped, formatting, specs, Credo, 100% coverage, and Dialyzer).

summary: Passed: the exact-HEAD implementation preserves the BOS authority boundary and adds durable, idempotent, authoritative PR-readiness confirmation before any merge-capable role; exact-commit targeted and full validation evidence is present.
